title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
